_comment: R19_L3 daemon registry consumed by scripts/daemon_watchdog.py. Each entry maps a logical daemon name to its launch + heartbeat config. expected_interval_sec mirrors the daemon's --interval-sec; the watchdog considers the daemon dead if the heartbeat file is older than expected_interval_sec * 3.

daemons.name: vault_dashboard_daemon
daemons.restart_cmd: cd /workspace/nba-ai-system && mkdir -p logs && nohup python -u scripts/vault_dashboard_daemon.py --interval-sec 30 > logs/vault_dashboard.log 2>&1 &

daemons.name: middle_finder_daemon
daemons.restart_cmd: cd /workspace/nba-ai-system && mkdir -p vault/Improvements && nohup python scripts/middle_finder_daemon.py --interval-sec 30 --min-width 0.5 --max-juice-each-side -135 > vault/Improvements/middle_finder.log 2>&1 &

daemons.name: line_move_detector
daemons.restart_cmd: cd /workspace/nba-ai-system && mkdir -p logs && nohup python -u scripts/line_move_detector.py --interval-sec 30 --threshold-line 0.5 --threshold-odds-pct 10 > logs/line_move_detector.log 2>&1 &

daemons.name: arb_emitter_daemon
daemons.restart_cmd: cd /workspace/nba-ai-system && mkdir -p logs && nohup python -u scripts/arb_emitter_daemon.py --interval 30 > logs/arb_emitter_daemon.log 2>&1 &

daemons.name: nba_lineup_daemon
daemons.restart_cmd: cd /workspace/nba-ai-system && mkdir -p logs && nohup python scripts/nba_lineup_daemon.py --interval-sec 60 > logs/nba_lineup_daemon.log 2>&1 &

daemons.name: auto_place_daemon
daemons.restart_cmd: cd /workspace/nba-ai-system && nohup python scripts/auto_place_daemon.py --slate sas_okc_2026-05-26 --interval-sec 60 --max-daily-bets 5 --confidence-floor 0.08 > logs/auto_place.log 2>&1 &

daemons.name: unified_scraper_orchestrator
daemons._note: async orchestrator; not auto-patched. process-alive check only.

daemons.name: inplay_bet_ranker
daemons.restart_cmd: cd /workspace/nba-ai-system && nohup python scripts/inplay_bet_ranker.py --game-id 0042400317 --date 2026-05-26 --interval-sec 30 --bankroll 1000 --pregame-win-prob 0.55 --season 2024-25 --max-wait-sec 14400 --log vault/Improvements/inplay_bet_ranker.log >> logs/inplay_bet_ranker.stdout.log 2>&1 &

daemons.name: fd_scraper
daemons.restart_cmd: cd /workspace/nba-ai-system && mkdir -p logs/R16 && tmux new-session -d -s fd_daemon 'python3 -u scripts/probe_R15_curl_cffi_fanduel.py --daemon --interval-sec 60 >> logs/R16/fd.log 2>&1'

daemons.name: bov_scraper
daemons.restart_cmd: cd /workspace/nba-ai-system && mkdir -p logs/R16 && tmux new-session -d -s bov_daemon 'python3 -u scripts/bov_scraper_daemon.py --interval-sec 60 --sports nba >> logs/R16/bov.log 2>&1'

daemons.name: pinnacle_scraper
daemons.restart_cmd: cd /workspace/nba-ai-system && mkdir -p logs/R16 && tmux new-session -d -s pin_daemon 'python3 -u scripts/pinnacle_scraper.py --interval-sec 30 >> logs/R16/pin.log 2>&1'

daemons.name: dk_inplay_scraper
daemons.restart_cmd: cd /workspace/nba-ai-system && mkdir -p logs && nohup python -u scripts/draftkings_inplay_scraper.py --daemon --interval 30 > logs/dk_inplay.log 2>&1 &
daemons._note: Writes data/lines/<date>_dk_inplay.csv during live games. Without this in the watchdog the grader corpus stops growing (see docs/VS_VEGAS_ASSESSMENT.md §2).

daemons.name: fd_inplay_scraper
daemons.restart_cmd: cd /workspace/nba-ai-system && mkdir -p logs && nohup python -u scripts/fanduel_inplay_scraper.py --daemon --interval 60 > logs/fd_inplay.log 2>&1 &
